message.content:
#set page(margin: 1in)
#set text(font: "New Computer Modern", size: 11pt)

#let hbar = $planck.bar$

#align(center, [
  #text(size: 1.5em, weight: "bold")[Inline and Display Mathematics] \
  Source-backed grouped formula sample \
  #v(1em)
])

= Expressions

*Expression 1.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ 8 f_4^((8)) phi^i phi^j phi^k phi^l v^p [ delta^(s i) (theta gamma^(p m) theta) (theta gamma^(m j) theta)(theta gamma^(k n) theta)(theta gamma^(l n) theta) + delta^(s p) (theta gamma^(m i) theta)(theta gamma^(m j) theta)(theta gamma^(k n) theta)(theta gamma^(l n) theta)] ~ , $

*Expression 2.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ K[H_n, 1] = ( (m omega sqrt(xi xi_0)) / (i hbar sin omega t) ) ( (m omega sqrt(eta eta_0)) / (i hbar sin omega t) ) J_n ( (m omega sqrt(xi xi_0)) / (i hbar sin omega t) ) J_n ( (m omega sqrt(eta eta_0)) / (i hbar sin omega t) ) $

*Expression 3.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ E(beta) = E_0 + tilde(E)(beta) = 1/(2r) sum_(ell=1)^infinity ell^2 (ell^2 + mu_eff^2)^(1/2) + 1/r sum_(ell=1)^infinity (ell^2 (ell^2 + mu_eff^2)^(1/2)) / (e^(beta (ell^2 + mu_eff^2)^(1/2) / r) - 1) , $

*Expression 4.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ (G'(1/2 + 1/sqrt(2) - i beta, 1/2 - 1/sqrt(2) - i beta; (i z_0) / (hbar c))) / (G(1/2 + 1/sqrt(2) - i beta, 1/2 - 1/sqrt(2) - i beta; (i z_0) / (hbar c))) = - i / (2 hbar c) - (1/2 + i beta) 1 / z_0 . $

*Expression 5.* The following expression is taken from a source-backed formula corpus.

$ W = product_(a=1)^(p-1) ( n^(1/l) / L_a ) integral_0^infinity (d s) / s ( pi / (2 s) )^((p-1)/2) e^(-r^2 s) (4 sinh^2(omega_l s sin(phi/2)) - sinh^2(2 omega_l s sin(phi/2))) / (cos(phi/2) sinh(2 omega_l s sin(phi/2))) . $
